search.query: `netflow_index` nfc_id="20062" | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(flow_count) as sum_flow_count sum(bytes_in) as sum_bytes_in sum(bytes_out) as sum_bytes_out by nfo_hostname exp_ip action direction src_ip dest_ip dest_port _time

| search direction="outbound" dest_port=53 action="allowed" | eval host_pair = src_ip." - ".dest_ip | stats sum(sum_flow_count) as Flows, sum(sum_bytes_out) as Bytes_Sent, sum(sum_bytes_in) as Bytes_Rcvd by host_pair | `commas_formatting(Flows,Flows)` | `commas_formatting(Bytes Sent,Bytes_Sent)` | `commas_formatting(Bytes Rcvd,Bytes_Rcvd)` | table host_pair "Bytes Sent" "Bytes Rcvd" Flows | rename host_pair as "Host Pair" | sort 10 -Bytes_Sent

| search direction="inbound" dest_port=53 action="allowed" | eval Threat = reputation."(".threat_list_name.")" | eval host_pair = src_ip." - ".dest_ip | stats sum(sum_flow_count) as Flows, sum(sum_bytes_out) as Bytes_Sent, sum(sum_bytes_in) as Bytes_Rcvd by host_pair | `commas_formatting(Flows,Flows)` | `commas_formatting(Bytes Sent,Bytes_Sent)` | `commas_formatting(Bytes Rcvd,Bytes_Rcvd)` | table host_pair "Bytes Sent" "Bytes Rcvd" Flows | rename host_pair as "Host Pair" | sort 10 -Bytes_Sent

| search direction="internal" dest_port=53 action="allowed" | eval Threat = reputation."(".threat_list_name.")" | eval host_pair = src_ip." - ".dest_ip | stats sum(sum_flow_count) as Flows, sum(sum_bytes_out) as Bytes_Sent, sum(sum_bytes_in) as Bytes_Rcvd by host_pair | `commas_formatting(Flows,Flows)` | `commas_formatting(Bytes Sent,Bytes_Sent)` | `commas_formatting(Bytes Rcvd,Bytes_Rcvd)` | table host_pair "Bytes Sent" "Bytes Rcvd" Flows | rename host_pair as "Host Pair" | sort 10 -Bytes_Sent

| search direction="outbound" action="allowed" | lookup `is_local_lookup` critical_ports_lookup dest_port OUTPUT service | search service=* | eval host_pair = src_ip." - ".dest_ip.":".dest_port." (".service.")" | stats sum(sum_flow_count) as Flows, sum(sum_bytes_out) as Bytes_Sent, sum(sum_bytes_in) as Bytes_Rcvd by host_pair | `commas_formatting(Flows,Flows)` | `commas_formatting(Bytes Sent,Bytes_Sent)` | `commas_formatting(Bytes Rcvd,Bytes_Rcvd)` | table host_pair "Bytes Sent" "Bytes Rcvd" Flows | rename host_pair as "Host Pair" | sort 10 -Bytes_Sent

| search direction="inbound" action="allowed" | lookup `is_local_lookup` critical_ports_lookup dest_port OUTPUT service | search service=* | eval host_pair = src_ip." - ".dest_ip.":".dest_port." (".service.")" | stats sum(sum_flow_count) as Flows, sum(sum_bytes_out) as Bytes_Sent, sum(sum_bytes_in) as Bytes_Rcvd by host_pair | `commas_formatting(Flows,Flows)` | `commas_formatting(Bytes Sent,Bytes_Sent)` | `commas_formatting(Bytes Rcvd,Bytes_Rcvd)` | table host_pair "Bytes Sent" "Bytes Rcvd" Flows | rename host_pair as "Host Pair" | sort 10 -Bytes_Sent

| search direction="internal" action="allowed" | lookup `is_local_lookup` critical_ports_lookup dest_port OUTPUT service | search service=* | eval host_pair = src_ip." - ".dest_ip.":".dest_port." (".service.")" | stats sum(sum_flow_count) as Flows, sum(sum_bytes_out) as Bytes_Sent, sum(sum_bytes_in) as Bytes_Rcvd by host_pair | `commas_formatting(Flows,Flows)` | `commas_formatting(Bytes Sent,Bytes_Sent)` | `commas_formatting(Bytes Rcvd,Bytes_Rcvd)` | table host_pair "Bytes Sent" "Bytes Rcvd" Flows | rename host_pair as "Host Pair" | sort 10 -Bytes_Sent

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10062: Network Conversations” (syslogs with nfc_id=20062). This Module identifies and reports hosts with the most traffic (optionally all hosts). It consolidates NetFlow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol. For bidirectional flows the Module stitches request-reply flows inverting source and destination for flows in the opposite direction. It reports consolidated flows separating bytes/packets sent and bytes/packets received.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
